title: Diagnose setup token rejection
description: Admin login rejects a freshly read setup token from the running backend container. Verify the UI auth proxy path, backend target, and token comparison behavior, then fix the failing path.
close_reason: Confirmed token rejection was caused by one-time setup-token rotation and a misconfigured host-side 3010 dev proxy; restarted 3010 with UI_API_PROXY_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:8080.

title: Block sidebar navigation before login
description: Unauthenticated users can click left navigation links while the admin login screen is visible. Disable or guard sidebar navigation until login succeeds.
close_reason: Sidebar navigation is disabled on the admin login route and covered by shell/renderer tests.

title: Fix stale or wide admin login on local UI
description: Investigate why http://localhost:3001 still shows the admin login as a wide panel instead of the floating login window and update runtime/docs/code as needed.
close_reason: Rebuilt the local UI container and bumped immutable UI asset query strings to admin-login-2 so browsers fetch the floating-window login CSS.

title: Fix UI Docker admin login smoke
description: Refresh the UI Docker runtime after markdown centralization so the admin-login bundle is visible in Docker smoke, including cache-busting static assets and documentation updates.
close_reason: Rebuilt Docker login smoke path, fixed UI Dockerfile after markdown centralization, bumped static asset cache key, and documented the admin-login Docker checks.

title: Complete frontend admin login session flow
description: Implement the requested frontend admin login completion items in groupscout-ui: logout client support, route auth checks, post-login verification, visible logout control, production readiness enforcement, and focused tests.
close_reason: Stale duplicate of groupscout-site-9ge; frontend admin login session flow is already implemented, tested, and documented under 9ge in the current frontend/backend source repos.

title: Complete admin login flow
description: Implement the admin-login gaps found in the backend and frontend: logout/revoke support, safer setup-token/session handling, protected raw routes, frontend auth checks and logout UI, plus changelog and markdown documentation updates.
close_reason: Completed backend and frontend admin login flow, added tests, regenerated frontend assets, updated centralized changelogs and auth docs.

title: Define raw audit redaction policy
description: Define the raw audit redaction policy before any inline raw-payload display. Cover which fields are redacted, which payload types are allowed in UI previews, how authenticated raw audit access differs from inline evidence display, and what tests must block unsafe payload exposure.
close_reason: Defined raw audit redaction policy in coordination docs, including inline-preview redaction fields, allowed payload classes, authenticated raw access boundary, and blocking test expectations.

title: Fix Ollama extraction nil guard
description: Promote the highest-risk backend smell candidate to a bug. internal/enrichment/enricher.go can dereference the signal returned by Ollama extraction even though internal/enrichment/ollama_extractor.go may return nil without an error. Add a failing test, guard nil extraction results, and preserve existing enrichment behavior for non-nil signals.
close_reason: Fixed in backend branch bug/ollama-nil-guard at 9af5fb3. Added a failing test for nil Ollama extraction signals, guarded nil signals in the enricher, and verified go test ./internal/enrichment plus go test ./... .

title: Review and consolidate coordination repo docs
description: Inspect groupscout-site documentation for duplicate or fragmented files, merge low-risk overlaps where needed, and keep follow-up work tracked for any larger consolidation.
close_reason: Closed

title: Refactor and cover missing backend and frontend tests
description: Audit backend and frontend for missing or weak tests around recently split modules, then add focused behavior-preserving tests and refactor test helpers where useful.
close_reason: Added backend split UI API helper/routing tests and frontend split renderer module/static-build tests; verified go test ./... and npm test.

title: Refactor backend and frontend complex files
description: Audit both GroupScout implementation repositories for code smells, then refactor huge or complex files while keeping source changes scoped and verified.
close_reason: Split oversized backend UI API handlers and frontend DOM renderer into focused modules; verified backend and frontend test suites.

title: Consolidate source repo documentation into coordination repo
description: Ensure backend and frontend implementation repositories retain only rich developer-friendly README files for documentation, with long-form documentation centralized in groupscout-site.
close_reason: Completed source README consolidation and moved remaining backend prompt documentation into groupscout-site.

title: Document admin setup token location
description: Add the exact Docker setup-token path and command for reading the admin login token to centralized frontend docs.
close_reason: Documented the in-container admin setup-token path and host docker exec read command in centralized frontend docs.

title: Update testing-oriented project docs
description: Refresh how-to, testing, developer guide, and troubleshooting markdown documentation with current testing workflow details after the admin login UI update.
close_reason: Updated centralized frontend how-to, testing, developer guide, and troubleshooting docs with admin login floating-window testing guidance.

title: Make admin login a floating window
description: Update the GroupScout operator console login screen so the admin login appears as a compact floating window instead of a wide embedded panel.
close_reason: Admin login now renders as a compact floating window in the UI repo.

title: Document admin token login flow
description: Update the centralized backend and frontend markdown docs with the current admin setup-token login, logout, token rotation, Docker smoke, and troubleshooting flow.
close_reason: Added backend and frontend admin-token flow docs and expanded related testing, troubleshooting, API, Docker, setup, README, and changelog documentation.

title: Refresh testing Docker documentation
description: Document the current Docker-backed testing workflow across backend, frontend, how-to, developer guide, troubleshooting, and nice-to-know docs after validating the necessary runtime images.
close_reason: Documented the current Docker testing prep state, smoke commands, and Ollama caveat across backend/frontend testing, how-to, developer, troubleshooting, nice-to-know, and changelog docs.

title: Check admin login completion
description: Inspect backend and frontend repositories from the coordinator repo to determine whether admin login is implemented, including branches, routes, UI flow, tests, and gaps.
close_reason: Checked backend and frontend admin login. Minimal setup-token login/session flow exists; full admin login is not complete due backend auth gaps and frontend missing route-level session flow/logout.

title: Refresh centralized developer docs
description: Update how-to, testing, developer guide, and troubleshooting markdown files after moving backend and frontend docs into the coordinator repository.
close_reason: Updated centralized how-to, developer, testing, and troubleshooting docs with coordinator repo workflow, source repo command locations, and current backend/UI smoke expectations.

title: Centralize project markdown docs
description: Move markdown documentation from the backend and frontend repositories into this coordinating site repo so future feature and bug-fix prompts can start here while agents route implementation work to the backend and frontend repos.
close_reason: Markdown docs moved into coordinator repo; backend and frontend source repos now carry doc-removal branches.

title: Add real browser Phase 15 harness
description: Add a frontend follow-up for real browser verification of Phase 15 UX hardening. Current evidence is deterministic/model-level only; add Playwright or equivalent browser checks for focus traversal, computed layout, screenshots, pixel checks, responsive framing, and text-overlap detection once the UI repo accepts a browser harness dependency.

title: Consolidate backend roadmap and phase planning docs
description: Follow-up after groupscout-site-ilr. Align backend ROADMAP.md, planning/PHASES.md, PLANNING.md, FUTURE_INTEGRATION.md, TECH_IDEAS.md, groupscout-plan.md, and related planning indexes so PHASES.md is the canonical atomic tracker and ROADMAP.md is the strategic summary. Resolve phase-number drift, stale current-status language, UI/API implementation status, Ollama/provider-abstraction wording, and deployment roadmap conflicts without changing runtime code.

title: Resolve backend Ollama documentation split
description: Clarify the difference between implemented Ollama operational support and planned LLM provider abstraction. Align SETUP.md, OLLAMA_SETUP.md, OLLAMA_INTEGRATION.md, DEVELOPER.md, PHASES.md, and ROADMAP.md so model names, env vars, docker profile/service expectations, model pull/push commands, and completed-vs-planned status do not contradict each other. Preserve existing operational commands unless source-code verification proves they are stale.

title: Consolidate backend operational runbooks
description: Follow-up from groupscout-site-fjy. Review and carefully consolidate backend Docker/testing/deployment/Ollama runbooks without losing operational smoke commands. Candidate canonical docs: BACKEND_FRONTEND_DOCKER_E2E.md for backend-plus-UI Docker smoke, HOME_DEPLOY.md for step-by-step home deployment, OLLAMA_SETUP.md for Ollama operations, ROADMAP.md plus planning/PHASES.md for planning state.

title: Consolidate frontend runtime and auth docs
description: Follow-up from groupscout-site-fjy. Trim duplicated Docker/runtime/admin-auth instructions across frontend README, testing, developer-guide, how-to-run-backend, troubleshooting, docker-runtime-matrix, and admin-token-flow. Keep docker-runtime-matrix canonical for Docker mode selection and admin-token-flow canonical for login/token rotation.
close_reason: Consolidated frontend runtime/auth docs by keeping docker-runtime-matrix.md canonical for Docker modes and admin-token-flow.md canonical for setup-token login/logout/cache recovery. Removed duplicated command blocks and fixed the D4 /api/system smoke expectation to require 200.

title: Continue remaining backend and frontend smell refactors
description: Remaining smell candidates after extracting backend lead action transitions and frontend verification rules: backend cmd/server/main.go wiring helpers, permit collector shared PDF helpers, enrichment prompt/provider cleanup, and nil Ollama extraction guard; frontend leadDetail constants/date helpers, productionServer request-path helpers, staticAppEntry versioned imports, pipelineRuntime requestJson helper, and staticStyles.css organization.

title: Continue large-file refactors in backend and frontend
description: Follow-up refactor candidates from the parallel smell scan: backend cmd/server/main.go, Richmond/Delta permit parsers, storage lead transitions, and enrichment provider modules; frontend staticStyles.css, leadDetail.js, verificationQueue.js, productionServer.js, pipelineRuntime.js, and staticAppEntry.js. Prioritize behavior-preserving splits with tests.
close_reason: Completed this smell-refactor pass by extracting backend lead action transition logic and frontend verification trigger rules; opened groupscout-site-2h1 for remaining candidates.
